description: Compile domino or chain-reaction prompts into ordered contact propagation where only the first object is actively triggered.
physical_assumptions: The first chain object may receive active motion.
Activation of each later object should follow predecessor contact.
Simultaneous unexplained passive activation is invalid.
verifier_rules: Each passive domino activation frame is known.
Each activation is after predecessor contact.
No passive domino activates without an incoming contact edge.
First broken edge is reported when sequence fails.
repair_suggestions: Clear passive domino initial angular velocity.
Ensure adjacent contact events are captured.
